name: fabrio
description: Fabrio workflow skills (feature-request, ops-heartbeat, merge-task, generate-plan, revise-plan, consolidate-learnings) plus the bundled Fabrio MCP connection. Installing this connects Claude Code to your Fabrio account and adds the /fabrio:* commands.

api_key.title: Fabrio API Key
api_key.description: Create one in Fabrio → Settings → API keys (starts with fab_live_). Scoped to a single account.

mcp_url.title: Fabrio MCP URL
mcp_url.description: The Fabrio MCP endpoint. Leave as the default unless self-hosting or developing locally (e.g. http://localhost:3000/api/mcp).
